---
title: "Archived 2026 Split: ODEs, optim, and ODE Fitting"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Archived split note

The earlier mixed `deSolve` and `optim()` deck has been split for the 2026
course.

- Core Day 3 ODE material now lives in `modules/ODEs.qmd`.
- Optional maximum-likelihood material now lives in `modules/optim-likelihood.qmd`.
- Optional ODE parameter-fitting material now lives in
  `modules/ODE-parameter-fitting.qmd`.

This file is excluded from the Quarto render in `_quarto.yml` and is kept only
as a pointer for anyone looking for the old combined source path.
